template_notice: FAIL-CLOSED: inspect one direct Grok-native scene JPG for every factual source record.
project_hash_semantics: SHA-256 of sorted compact UTF-8 JSON with integral floats and negative zero normalized

observed_page.panel_count: observed integer including any accidental extra panel
observed_page.background_pct: observed reserved white/black background percentage; OTHER normally 0

source_record_schema.text_status: PASS only when no unintended readable text/captions exist
source_record_schema.bubble_status: PASS only when no unintended speech bubble exists

observation.observer_id: actual tool/run ID or human reviewer ID
observation.evidence: factual evidence from inspection of this direct JPG
